signals.title: Spain's Draft Organic Law for the Protection of Minors in Digital Environments
signals.summary: Spain has proposed a draft law aimed at protecting minors from digital risks by implementing parental controls, content restrictions, and educational measures.
key_provisions: Prohibition of loot boxes for minors
Legal amendments to penalize harmful conduct

signals.title: Slovenia's Draft Law on Cannabis for Limited Personal Use
signals.summary: Slovenia's draft law to legalize cannabis for personal use raises concerns about child protection and compliance with international laws.

signals.title: European Commission's Guidance on Age Assurance
signals.summary: The European Commission issued guidance on age assurance methods to protect minors online, focusing on transparency and effectiveness.

signals.title: EU-Harmonised Age Verification Approach
signals.summary: The European Commission is developing a harmonised age verification method to help online platforms implement privacy-preserving systems.
key_provisions: Interoperability with EU Digital Identity Wallets

signals.title: Guidelines on the Protection of Minors
signals.summary: Guidelines published to ensure high levels of privacy and safety for minors on online platforms, with recommendations to reduce exposure to harmful content.

signals.title: European Commission Investigates Snapchat's Compliance with Child Protection Rules
signals.summary: The European Commission opened proceedings to assess Snapchat's compliance with child protection rules under the Digital Services Act.

signals.title: European Commission Finds Pornographic Websites in Breach of DSA for Allowing Minor Access
signals.summary: The European Commission found several pornographic websites in breach of the Digital Services Act for failing to protect minors from exposure to adult content.
key_provisions: Protection of minors from adult content
